narrative:
Westerville 1-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 798 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
